metadata.description: Extract the most valuable clips from YouTube videos automatically (including embedded subtitles, transcript and reason for engaging clip).

plugins.name: get-y2b-clips
plugins.description: Extract the most meaningful, engaging clips from YouTube videos. Analyzes transcripts to find high-value segments based on controversy, insightful analysis, or user-specified topics.

plugins.name: add-subtitles
plugins.description: Add burned-in subtitles to a video the user uploads or points to on disk. Transcribes the audio with Whisper and burns styled captions directly into the video.
